input.background: Ten people are given a choice of two treatments. Let $p$ represent the proportion of patients in the patient population who prefer treatment A.
input.question: Among the 10 patients asked, 7 preferred method A. Assuming there is no preference in the patient population (i.e., $p= 0.5)$, calculate $\operatorname{Pr}(X \geq 7)$.

output.method: 事件发生概率及独立性

number_of_patients.description: The total number of patients surveyed.

patients_preferring_A.description: The number of patients who preferred treatment A.

proportion_p.description: The assumed proportion of the patient population that prefers treatment A.

meta_info.caption: Patient preference.
meta_info.section: 8.3 SAMPLING BEHAVIOR OF A COUNT AND PROPORTION
